title: Pawel i Gawel
writer: Jan Fethke, Aleksander Fredro, Napoleon Sadek
actors: Eugeniusz Bodo, Adolf Dymsza, Helena Grossówna
plot: Two neighbours with similar names, Pawel and Gawel, meet a violinist girl Violetta who pretends to be a child. When Pawel learns she's not a child anymore, he falls in love with her. And vice versa.
